title: test/e2e/run_signal_test.go Racey signal test
body:
One of the signal tests has become very racey recently and is causing
PRs to pile up.  Decision was made to skip/disable it for now while
we work on making it more stable.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: :umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably 196c3ab) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Looks like @mheon beat me to it
